productDisplayName: FILA Men Black Change The Game Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Crafted from Italy's materials capital Biella, this fila shoe promises a smooth ride and optimal durability. Fila fanboys know the comfort that this brand provides - do you need more reasons to buy the Fila Change the Game 2? Product Details Round toed white and black mid-top shoe with central lace-ups and shiny synthetic overlays Heavily padded inner, tongue and collar Tough rubber midsole  Aggressive TPU outsole with flex grooves and patterned lugs Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
